prerequisites: A Katana account on the Professional plan or higher, which is required for API access.
A Katana API key generated from the in-app settings (used for the api_key field).
A start date (start_date) to define the earliest point from which records are synced.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Katana authenticates with an API key passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Provide this value in the connector's api_key field. Keep the key server-side only and never expose it in frontend code.

setupSteps.title: Confirm plan eligibility
setupSteps.body: Ensure your Katana account is on the Professional plan or higher, since API access is gated to those plans.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key in Katana
setupSteps.body: In the Katana app, go to Settings > API > API keys, then click '+ Add new API key' to generate a key, and copy it. Treat the key as a secret and store it securely.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated key into the api_key field. Set start_date to the earliest date from which you want records synced. The connector sends the key as 'Authorization: Bearer <api_key>' against the Katana API base URL https://api.katanamrp.com/v1.
